text_block_list.text: Fu... ku... come... cellar... There... you will...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I will?! Wait! Come back! Is this a prophecy?!
What will I do in the cellar?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Flyin' fragalo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking around the academy when I see
Matikanefukukitaru frenziedly picking every
flower in sight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... P-please don't stop me! I must fulfill the prophecy I saw in my dream, to achieve happiness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look down at her feet to find a single sheet of
paper. Scribbled on it are what appear to be
drawings of flowers, a dancer, some numbers, and
other various things.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It isn't a doodle! It is a ritual diagram!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
While back home visiting my family, I received a
divine message in a dream telling me to search for
something in the cellar... When I went, I
discovered this paper!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Can you believe the prophecy came true?! The
ritual depicted in this diagram must reveal
something truly miraculous!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Except I'm having trouble understanding it. Still, I will eventually decipher its contents to successfully perform the ritual, and soon be blessed beyond imagination!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly dashes away, brimming with
excitement. Worried about what she might be
getting up to, I quickly follow.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
La la la... ♪ Chrysanthemum flowers, pluckity
plucked... ♪ Boiled with a dash of—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oho, chrysanthemum flowers! And actually, they
look quite like the flowers in my ritual diagram.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: In that case... Time to dig in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah?! F-Fuku?! Those are mine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Burp... Finally, with this... Blegh! No... I have to hold it in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right! Next is... to run on the track while
dancing! The ritual diagram's word is absolute!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Uh oh, Fukukitaru's up to funny business again!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...When will we get our chance to run?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to stop Matikanefukukitaru to no avail. She
continues her rampage throughout the academy...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I understand your side of the story. However, I
cannot overlook the fact that you ignored a
trainer's warnings and caused trouble for the
other students.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I-I'm really, really sorry...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... I was feeling lucky, but ended up with
great misfortune... What do I do?
choice_data_list: Are you sure that's really a diagram for a ritual?
Are you sure that's really a diagram for a ritual?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course it... Well, it probably is? I mean, I think
so, at least. G-give me just a second!

text_block_list.name: Fukukitaru's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Looks like your dad and grandma don't know
anything about a ritual diagram in the cellar
either. We don't keep any of our Shinto materials
down there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...It looks like neither Mom, Dad, nor Granny
knows about it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What could it possibly beee?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: How could no one have any clue?! Someone must have hidden it away there! Who could it have been?! Who?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no waaay nobody knows! Aaargh!
Someone tell me what this iiiis!
choice_data_list:
Maybe it's a secret spell for extreme
happiness?!
Something that must be sealed away, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! A secret spell for extreme happiness?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense, I think?! If it's a secret spell of
the highest order, no wonder nobody knows
about it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aww, of course! I made all this fuss for nothing! I'll
be back tomorrow to solve this riddle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel a kind of respect for how
quickly Matikanefukukitaru gets right back on her
feet.

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooow!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Was that a black cat that just passed by?! Is it a sign of bad things to come?! Are the gods telling me I shouldn't stick my nose into this any further?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eek! Great Shiraoki, please save meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She runs off before I can even say a word, leaving
me stupefied.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I knew it! I knew it had to be something like that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, I must return the paper to the cellar! But
first, I shall seal away any evils! Foonjarga, be
forever gone! Come back, no no!
Sigh... Really? But... one day you'll find... I know... you will...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh? I just felt a wave of warmth wash over!
Could it have been the spirit of someone passed?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The best I can muster is a puzzled nod. I could
have sworn I heard a voice... I part ways with her,
leaving the mystery unanswered.
